title: Crataegus oxyacantha splendens
taxonomy: Crataegus oxyacantha splendens is a cultivar of the species Crataegus oxyacantha, commonly known as the midland hawthorn. The genus Crataegus falls under the family Rosaceae, which includes other popular fruits and flowers such as roses and strawberries. Crataegus oxyacantha splendens is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe. It is classified as a species within the subgenus Crataegus, which includes various types of hawthorns. Within the Rosaceae family, Crataegus oxyacantha splendens is also a member of the subfamily Rosoideae.
benefits: Crataegus oxyacantha splendens, also known as the Midland hawthorn, has been traditionally used for its various health benefits. It is believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. properties: Crataegus oxyacantha splendens, commonly known as the flowering hawthorn, has been traditionally used for its therapeutic properties. It is said to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant contains flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic benefits. parts: Crataegus oxyacantha splendens, also known as the Scarlet Hawthorn, is a variety of the Crataegus oxyacantha species. intro: Crataegus oxyacantha splendens, commonly known as the midland hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The midland hawthorn has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to support cardiovascular health, with potential benefits including lowered blood pressure, improved heart function, and antioxidant effects. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, as well as oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs) and triterpenoid saponins. The midland hawthorn is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, as well as in combination with other herbs in heart health supplements.
